intro: Dacryodes patentinervia, also known as the Black Ironwood tree, is a medicinal plant species native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. The health benefits of Dacryodes patentinervia include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and gastrointestinal problems.
